## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Verify scripts pass (`verify-theme`, `verify-manifest`, `verify-sw`, `verify-no-mui`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change where it makes sense
- [ ] No backend dependency introduced; student data still stays on-device
- [ ] Accessibility preserved (keyboard nav, dialog descriptions)
